mapper.select:
SELECT user_one, user_sec, status, block_status, user_one_remark, user_sec_remark, created_at, updated_at FROM friend WHERE user_one = #{userId}
AND status = 'ACCEPTED' AND block_status NOT IN ('USER_ONE_BLOCKED', 'USER_SEC_BLOCKED', 'BOTH_BLOCKED')

SELECT user_one, user_sec, status, block_status, user_one_remark, user_sec_remark, created_at, updated_at FROM friend WHERE user_sec = #{userId} AND status = 'ACCEPTED' AND block_status NOT IN ('USER_ONE_BLOCKED', 'USER_SEC_BLOCKED', 'BOTH_BLOCKED')
